$comment: EVERY Snorkel DOM selector lives here. No selector string may appear in a .ts file. Candidates are tried in order; first match wins. `{token}` placeholders are substituted at resolve time. Regenerate candidates with: npm run selectors:record

home.searchInput.description: Search box above the task list

home.assignmentsList.description: Container for the 'Tasks to be revised' cards

home.newSubmissionLink.description: The 'Submission' card's link — clicking its Start button opens a NEW submission

home.newSubmissionStart.description: Start button inside the new-submission card

home.reviseCard.description: The revise card for ONE task. The task uuid IS the testid prefix. Its href carries ?assignmentId=

submission.uid.description: Submission UID in the sticky header, next to the 'UID:' label

submission.section.description: Radix accordion section wrapping the whole form. MUST be expanded — Radix does not mount the fields until it is open.

submission.autosave.description: 'Last saved at HH:MM' indicator. Confirms the server took our field writes.

submission.zipInput.description: File input for the task zip. It is class='hidden' — use setInputFiles, never click.

submission.zipFilename.description: Rendered filename after a successful attach — proof the upload took

submission.promptCheckbox.description: REQUIRED attestation: 'I reviewed my prompt (instruction.md)...'. Only tick after our own lint has actually verified those claims. Check feedback stays disabled until this is ticked.

candidates.name: /I confirm that the above is true/i

submission.checkFeedbackButton.description: 'Check feedback' — runs Snorkel's fast static checks. Rendered disabled until zip + 3 explanations + prompt checkbox are all done. Its disabled state IS our readiness oracle.

submission.checkFeedbackMissingFields.description: 'Complete required fields first: ...' — Snorkel telling us exactly what didn't take. Read this instead of guessing.

submission.textSummaryField.description: 'Summary' — Monaco editor (inmemory://model/1). Agent simulation + per-test stats + instruction sufficiency. READ VIA THE MONACO MODEL, not .view-line: Monaco virtualizes and you would silently get a truncated log.

submission.agentReviewField.description: 'Agent review' — populated after Submit, not after Check feedback

submission.generateRubricCheckbox.description: PLACEHOLDER — 'generate rubric automatically'. Confirm with `npm run selectors:record`. Tick ONLY after Check feedback comes back green.

submission.submitButton.description: PLACEHOLDER — the real Submit. Irreversible. Confirm with `npm run selectors:record`.

rubric.instance.description: Nth criterion row. Radix mounts its fields only when the row is open.
